title: author_artifact
description: Result of authoring the selected Kitsoki improvement plus no-LLM coverage, with the validation verdict.

files_changed.description: Room YAML + flow fixture (and any schema/prompt) that were written.

flows_green.description: True only if `kitsoki test flows` passed for the edited story with the new fixture.

artifact_kind.description: Kind produced: ENRICH-STORY, NEW-STORY, STARLARK-SCRIPT, HUB-ROUTE, SKILL-ONLY, or ENFORCEMENT-LIMIT.

applied_improvements.description: Concrete improvements applied or durable local tickets/proposals filed.

summary_markdown.description: Human-readable summary delivered to the transport.
